word: H3180 - יַחְמוּר - yachmûwr - yakh-moor' - Fallow deer

sections.paragraph:
Original: יחמוּר

Transliteration: yachmûr

Phonetic: yakh-moor'

BDB Definition:

  1. roebuck
    1. a kind of deer, reddish in colour
    2. perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from H2560

TWOT entry: 685b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
